title: Knee Surgery Tomorrow
body:
This mod adds the **Knee Villager**, a new villager with four trades: a Knee Surgery Appointment, two surprise music discs, and a surprise item.

- 🦵 **Spawning**: The Knee Villager spawns naturally in villages with a high chance in Survival mode. In Creative mode, use a spawn egg or the /summon command.
- 🦵 **Knee** **Surgery**: The Knee Surgery Appointment schedules surgery for the next day at 4,000 Minecraft time. After the surgery, you will have post-surgery symptoms.
- 🦵 **Recovery**: To recover, use a bucket to milk the Knee Villager and drink the goo. The goo improves your post-surgery symptoms.
- 🦵 **Tip: Milk the villager before scheduling surgery for easier recovery.**
